product_overview: KhelMitra AI is an intelligent match-day companion that helps fans navigate stadium visits with real-time gate crowd information, venue metadata, and personalized itinerary planning. It combines live telemetry, user profile memory, and AI-driven recommendations to improve arrival, entry, and overall stadium experience.
core_goals: Provide accurate stadium and venue metadata for fan navigation
Deliver live gate crowd and wait-time telemetry through APIs and WebSockets
Enable user authentication, profile persistence, and preference-based personalization
Collect feedback to improve future route, gate, and food recommendations
Generate optimized match-day itineraries using natural language prompts and adaptive learning
Support fast health checks and reliable service observability

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Verify backend and database availability before using the application.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with service and database status indicating the backend is healthy
GET /api/health when the service or database is unavailable -> Receive an error response indicating the health check failed

features.name: Stadium and Venue Metadata
features.description: Allow users to list available stadiums and fetch gate configuration and venue details for a specific stadium.
user_flows: GET /api/stadiums -> Receive 200 with an array of stadium records -> GET /api/venue/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai -> Receive 200 with venue metadata including gates and stadium details
GET /api/venue/Unknown Stadium -> Receive 404 when the stadium name does not exist

features.name: Crowd Live Telemetry
features.description: Provide live and historical gate wait-time information plus a WebSocket stream for real-time crowd updates.
user_flows: GET /api/crowd/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai -> Receive 200 with current gate wait times -> GET /api/crowd/trend/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai -> Receive 200 with 30-minute crowd trend data
POST /api/crowd/update with stadium_name, gate_name, and waiting_time -> Receive 200 confirming the simulation update was applied
GET /api/crowd/Unknown Stadium -> Receive 404 when live crowd data is not available for the stadium
WebSocket connect to /ws/crowd -> Receive 200-style live crowd_update messages as gate telemetry changes
POST /api/crowd/update with missing or invalid waiting_time -> Receive 500 if the update cannot be processed

features.name: User Feedback Recording
features.description: Collect fan satisfaction signals about recommendations, routes, food, and gate experience to improve future personalization.
user_flows: POST /api/feedback with username, accepted_recommendation, rejected_recommendation, route_satisfaction, food_satisfaction, and gate_satisfaction -> Receive 200 confirming feedback was recorded
POST /api/feedback with malformed payload or invalid score values -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/feedback when persistence fails -> Receive 500 indicating the feedback could not be saved

features.name: Intelligent Match-Day Itinerary Planner
features.description: Generate optimized match-day itineraries from natural language prompts using stadium context, user preferences, and Gemini-based orchestration.
user_flows: POST /api/itinerary with prompt, stadium, crowd_tolerance, and dietary_preferences -> Receive 200 with an optimized itinerary and recommendations
POST /api/itinerary during a Gemini rate-limit or upstream failure -> Receive 500 after retry/backoff handling is exhausted
POST /api/itinerary with incomplete or invalid input -> Receive 500 when itinerary generation cannot complete

features.name: User Authentication and Profile Management
features.description: Support signup, login, logout, password recovery, and protected profile retrieval and updates using JWT and bcrypt.
user_flows: POST /auth/signup with username, email, password, dietary_preferences, crowd_tolerance, favorite_team, and preferred_gate -> Receive 200 confirming the account was created -> POST /auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /auth/profile with token -> Receive 200 with protected profile details -> POST /auth/profile with updated dietary_preferences or preferred_gate -> Receive 200 with saved profile changes
POST /auth/login with invalid username or password -> Receive 401 unauthorized
GET /auth/profile without a valid JWT token -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /auth/profile with an invalid or expired JWT token -> Receive 401 unauthorized
POST /auth/signup with a duplicate or invalid user payload -> Receive 400 indicating registration failed
POST /auth/profile for a user that does not exist -> Receive 404 not found
POST /auth/forgot-password with an email address -> Receive 200 confirming the forgot-password simulation request was accepted
POST /auth/logout -> Receive 200 confirming the session was ended

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Health check endpoint to verify database and service status

features.name: Stadium and Venue Metadata
features.description: APIs to list stadiums and fetch specific venue gate configuration

endpoints.description: Retrieve venue details by name. The stadium_name path parameter must be a raw string (e.g., "Wankhede Stadium Mumbai"). Do NOT pass dictionary or object representations.

features.name: Crowd Live Telemetry
features.description: APIs and WebSocket for stadium gate crowd status and simulator

endpoints.description: Retrieve stadium gate live wait times. The stadium_name path parameter must be a raw string.
Fetch 30-minute historical/simulated crowd wait time trends
Manually trigger simulation updates of crowd wait times
Persistent WebSocket connection for live telemetry updates

features.name: User Feedback Recording
features.description: Allows users to record route, food, and gate satisfaction feedback

features.name: Intelligent Match-Day Itinerary Planner
features.description: Processes natural language fan requests using Gemini agents and user profile adaptive learning

endpoints.description: Generate optimized match-day itinerary. Handle potential 429/503 Gemini model rate limits gracefully with backoffs.

features.name: User Authentication and Profile Management
features.description: JWT and bcrypt-based security system for registration, login, profile updates

endpoints.description: Register a new user. The dietary_preferences field in the body is a list of strings and must accept empty arrays [] or specific values like ["vegetarian"] without asserting on a single rigid format.
Authenticate user credentials and issue a JWT token
Update user profile settings. Must accept dietary_preferences as [] or ["vegetarian"].
